summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Google Drive Slideshow app iteration 3 (web scraping version). Successfully tested public Drive folder access with 497 images and 168 folders. All core slideshow functionality working correctly including navigation, auto-play, keyboard controls, and caching.

minor_bugs.issue: Invalid Drive links return 200 with empty results instead of 400 error
minor_bugs.impact: Poor error handling - users see empty slideshow instead of error message
minor_bugs.details: Backend should validate Drive link format and return 400 for invalid links instead of 200 with empty data

working_endpoints.status: Working correctly - returns 200 with 'Google Drive Slideshow API' message
Working correctly - successfully processes valid public Drive links, returns folder structure with 497 images and 168 folders
Working correctly - proxies images from Google Drive (200 for valid IDs, 404 for invalid)
Working correctly - clears cache and returns 200

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with Drive Slideshow title and subtitle
Drive link input field accepts text input and validates on Enter key
Load button shows loading state ('Scanning...') during API call
Backend API /api/ returns correct message (200)
Backend API /api/drive/folder processes valid Drive link correctly (200)
Backend API /api/drive/folder returns 422 for missing drive_link parameter
Backend API /api/drive/image/{file_id} serves images correctly (200 for valid, 404 for invalid)
Backend caching works - second request completed in 0.19s vs much longer initial scan
Backend cache clearing functionality works (200)
Slideshow page loads correctly after successful folder scan
Folder title displays correctly: 'NSO_Pictures_March_26'
Slide counter shows correct format: '1 / 510' (510 total items including folders)
Folder name overlay displays correctly on images
Slideshow image loads and displays correctly
Next/Previous navigation buttons work correctly
Play/Pause auto-play toggle works correctly
Auto-play advances slides every 5 seconds when enabled
Progress bar renders and updates correctly
Folder tree sidebar displays all items correctly
Folder tree items are clickable and navigate to correct slides
Back button navigates correctly from slideshow to landing page
Keyboard navigation works: Arrow keys for next/previous, Spacebar for play/pause
Empty state displays correctly for invalid Drive links
Go Back button works correctly from empty state
Swiss minimal design with correct fonts (Cabinet Grotesk for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body)
Correct color scheme (#002FA7 primary, #0A0A0A text, #F2F2F2 surface, white background)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Large folder handling works correctly (497 images, 168 folders processed successfully)
Web scraping approach works without OAuth requirements

success_percentage.backend: 88% (7/8 tests passed, 1 minor error handling issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components, navigation, slideshow features, and design working correctly)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor improvement: Add proper error handling for invalid Drive links in backend to return 400 status code instead of 200 with empty results. This will provide better user feedback.
